name: Medicinova Inc. Reg.Shares New
summary: Medicinova, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapeutics for neurological disorders, cancer, and other diseases. The company's pipeline includes MN-166 (ibudilast), a small molecule drug with anti-neuroinflammatory and neuroprotective properties. Medicinova is headquartered in La Jolla, California.
